answer:
For a 'product' module in a Go hexagonal architecture project, the correct directory structure should follow domain, application, and infrastructure layers:

internal/product/
  domain/
    product.go          (aggregate root entity)
    events/             (domain events)
  application/
    create_product/     (one directory per command/use case)
      command.go
      handler.go
  infrastructure/
    database/
      repository.go
      model.go
      mapper.go
    http/
      handler.go
  module.go             (module registration/wiring)
